---
name: 🐛 Bug report
about: Report a bug with the starter kit (script failures, broken templates, etc.)
title: "[Bug] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Summary

A clear, one-line description of the bug.

## Expected behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual behavior

What actually happened. Include error messages / output verbatim.

## Reproduction steps

1. Run `...`
2. Observe `...`
3. ...

Minimal repro = faster fix.

## Environment

- **Claude Code version:** (e.g. 1.x.y — run `claude --version` if applicable)
- **Starter kit version:** (cat `VERSION` in your kit copy)
- **OS:** (Linux / macOS / Windows + version)
- **Shell:** (bash / zsh / fish)

## Additional context

Screenshots, logs, anything that helps.
